SkillSet.title: Act 2-4 Level 12-39 Spectral Throw Or Helix

Skill.label: Spectral Throw is fine it was also buffed
Spectral Helix is strong but not many ppl like it
pride or flesh and stone if mana is tight
Only Level Precision as needed for accuracy
Proc Adrenaline With This aim for half hp cost
Herald of Purity drop this if you run grace
MAKES YOU GIGA TANKY BUT AN EXTRA BUTTON
Flesh and stone is more damage grace is tankier
Adrenaline proc get it to only take half ur hp
RUN THIS IF YOU NEED TO VS MAVEN OR SMTHN

Rarity: MAGIC Plentiful Quicksilver Flask of the Antelope Unique ID: e93eb51003af62fa19893ea1dc98f024cadb7c84467de0d3748c538907e13a74 Item Level: 70 Quality: 0 LevelReq: 25 Implicits: 1 {crafted}Used when Charges reach full +23 to Maximum Charges 48% increased Evasion Rating during Effect

Rarity: UNIQUE Dreamfeather Eternal Sword Variant: Pre 2.0.0 Variant: Pre 2.6.0 Variant: Pre 3.7.0 Variant: Current Selected Variant: 4 Quality: 20 Sockets: G-G-G LevelReq: 66 Implicits: 2 {variant:1,2}18% increased Global Accuracy Rating {variant:4,3}+475 to Accuracy Rating {variant:1}{range:0.5}Adds (15-30) to (35-50) Physical Damage {variant:2}{range:0.5}Adds (20-40) to (55-70) Physical Damage {variant:4,3}{range:0.902}Adds (30-50) to (65-80) Physical Damage {range:0.805}(20-25)% increased Attack Speed {range:0.768}+(180-200) to Evasion Rating 3% increased Movement Speed {variant:1,2,3}{range:0.5}+(180-200) to Accuracy Rating {variant:4}{range:0.5}+(280-300) to Accuracy Rating 1% increased Attack Damage per 450 Evasion Rating

Rarity: UNIQUE Fury Valve CHANGE THIS ANNOINT DEPENDING ON WHICH VERSION Turquoise Amulet LevelReq: 40 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Allocates Ambidexterity {tags:jewellery_attribute}{range:1}+(16-24) to Dexterity and Intelligence {tags:jewellery_defense}{range:0.5}(15-25)% increased Evasion Rating {tags:jewellery_resistance}{range:0.5}+(15-20)% to all Elemental Resistances Skills fire 2 additional Projectiles {tags:speed}{range:0.5}(20-30)% increased Projectile Speed Modifiers to number of Projectiles instead apply to the number of targets Projectiles Split towards

Rarity: UNIQUE Eternal Damnation Agate Amulet League: Sanctum Catalyst: Intrinsic CatalystQuality: 20 Variant: Pre 3.25.0 Variant: Current Selected Variant: 2 LevelReq: 52 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Allocates Ambidexterity {tags:jewellery_attribute}{range:1}+(16-24) to Strength and Intelligence {tags:mana}{range:0.5}+(40-70) to maximum Mana {tags:jewellery_resistance}{range:0.72}+(-13-13)% to Chaos Resistance {tags:jewellery_resistance}-5% to all maximum Resistances Gain additional Elemental Damage Reduction equal to half your Chaos Resistance {variant:2}Maximum Endurance, Frenzy and Power Charges is 0

Rarity: UNIQUE Ancestral Vision Viridian Jewel Limited to: 1 Implicits: 0 {range:0.5}+(5-10) to Dexterity Modifiers to Chance to Suppress Spell Damage also apply to Chance to Avoid Elemental Ailments at 50% of their Value

Rarity: RARE New Item Viridian Jewel Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.5}PercentIncreasedLifeJewel Prefix: {range:0.81}OneHandCritMultiplierJewel_ Suffix: None Suffix: {range:0.5}CriticalStrikeMultiplierJewel LevelReq: 0 Implicits: 0 +11% to Global Critical Strike Multiplier +17% to Critical Strike Multiplier with One Handed Melee Weapons 6% increased maximum Life

ItemSet.title: Entering Maps+ (this gear got me to t10 farm)
^6Mid Tier Gear - Tankier Version Change Annoint
^6Mid Tier Gear - More Damage Version Change Annoint

PathOfBuilding.Notes:
^xE05030 DO NOT LEVEL AS SPLITTING STEEL UNTIL YOU AT LEAST GET RETURN PROJECTILES + MARK ON HIT SNIPERS MARK IT FEELS SO FUCKING BAD UNTIL THIS POINT.^7
================================================================================================================================= ^7 ^7 ^xFFFF77 ^xE05030 ^x70FF70------=WEAPON CRAFTING IN CAMPAIGN=------^7^7^7 ================================================================================================================================= ^xFFFF77 Rare Axes^7 are the way to go but until about lvl 20ish+ just use whatever 2hander you find AFTER that we hopefully FIND a good ^xFFFF77axe^7 or Plan B ^x8888FFCrafting^7. - Using an ^x8888FFEssence of Contempt^7 - Using^x8888FF Rustic sash^7 recipe
^x70FF70 -= ^x70FF70AXE RECIPE WHILE LEVELING=- ^7 The recipe is done by vendoring Weapon + ^xFFFF77Rustic Sash ^7+^xC8C8C8^xAF6025 ^x7070FFBlacksmith's Whetstone.^7^7^7 You can also use a magic ^x8888FFRustic Sash^7 if you do not have a bad essence available to get a rare one. Do not use Alchemys on Rustic Sashes, you want to keep those to buy gems or to get better gear before maps.
NOTE that you only start using recipe from lvl 12 bases onwards, it isn't worth doing on early weapon bases.
Here are the weapon bases you want to look for until ^xFFFF77^xE05030 lvl^7^7 23):
1-8 : Corroded Blade 8-12 : Longsword - Jade Chopper 13-23 : Bastard Sword - Woodsplitter (First bases you want to rustic sash recipe or essence) 23-33 : Double Axe NO MORE ^xADAA47^x70FF70SWORDS^7^7 NOW ONLY ^xFFFF77AXES^7 33-45 : Shadow Axe 45-62 : Headsman Axe OR 49-62 : Labrys ------> This depends on wether your Shadow Axe is good or not, if it's only a Rustic recipe you want to get a Headsman Axe 62+ : Ezomyte Axe
=================================================================================================================================== ^x70FF70 -----=AXE CRAFTING=-----^7 ^7 ==================================================================================================================================== ^xD02090 ^7GOOD BASES : Ezomyte Axe, Despot Axe
I recommend crafting on ^xE05030Ezomyte^7 and^xE05030 Despot Axe^7 early as they have lot better base ^xFFFF77attack speed^7 and will feel good even without any attack speed rolled on them.
=================================================================================================================================== ^x70FF70 -----=Leveling Skills=-----^7 ^7 ==================================================================================================================================== I level'd with ^x70FF70Spectral Throw^7 then ^xD02090Helix^7 but honestly ^xD02090Helix^7 feels so fucking bad even if it is "better" and ^x70FF70Spectral Throw^7 also got the 20% increase in its leveling additive so personally I think I would just level ^x70FF70Spectral Throw^7 since it feels smoother. We only use whatever leveling skill you used until ^xFFFF77act 5^7 anyway since that's when ^x70FF70Splitting Steel^7 finally comes online.
===================================================================================================================================== ^x70FF70 -= Entering Maps =-^7 ====================================================================================================================================== You do not need a very good axe at all to start mapping just pick whichever option works at the time the axe I used was^xE05030 300dps^7 from a vendor then a ^xE05030400dps^7 axe in ^xFFFF77t10maps^7 you can get better.
Your first Axe is very straight forward, we'll craft on an Ezomyte Axe since it's the first tier 1 base you will be able to find at lvl 62. Your options are :
- Use an ^x8888FFEssence of Contempt^7 and craft ^x8888FF%physical damage^7 if there's an open prefix, craft ^x8888FFattack speed^7 if it already hit %phys. - Just alch it and if it has decent mods, crat ^x8888FF%phys^7 or ^x8888FFspeed^7 and go with it - If you have a ^xFFFF77Regal^7 orb, ^x8888FFalteration^7 spam until you hit a decent flat^x8888FF phys^7 roll, then ^xFFFF77regal^7 and craft ^x8888FFphys^7. ONLY DO THIS IF YOU HAVE LOTS OF ^x8888FFALTERATIONS^7, average of 40 to hit something good.
===================================================================================================================================== ^x70FF70 -= Mid Tier t10 farm =-^7 ====================================================================================================================================== I ^xE05030RECOMMEND^7 that you at least put the first ^x8888FF4 Atlas Points^7 into ^xFFFF77Prolific Essence^7 to try and find a few essences to craft axes/gear asap.
- I think ^x70FF70t10map^7s are good bridge stopping point for you to START buying all the ^xE05030uniques^7 and regearing around ^x70FF70Accuracy^7 to switch to ^x70FF70Precice^7 ^x70FF70Technique^7 AS SOON AS POSSIBLE
-This means you need a decent way to make some chaos early on personally I will do ^x8888FFexpedition^7 and ^x8888FFbetrayal^7 to get raw chaos and regrets to respec for example. along with basic betrayal craft options.
====================================================================================================================================== ^xB97123 -=UNIQUES IN THE ORDER I WILL PURCHASE THEM=-^7^x70FF70 ^7======================================================================================================================================^7 ^x70FF70 SOFTCORE PRICES ARE WHAT I AM USING FROM POE NINJA DAY 1 LAST 2 LEAGUE STARTS ^x70FF70 ^xB97123 -=Fury Valve, Turquoise Amulet=-^77^xFFFF77Chaos ^7on Day 1 last league start so let's assume 15c worst case scenario ^xB97123 ^7 -Not a rare item can be found early on and is pretty cheap in general but is sadly mandatory now since Snipers Mark nerf. -lvl 40 wearable ^xB97123-=Lioneye's Vision, Crusader Plate=-^73^xFFFF77Chaos^7^7 on Day 1 last league start so let's assume 10c worst case scenario -lvl 59 Wearable and is a good work around a 6link on day1-2 -Very common item will easily buy buyable ^xB97123 -=Perseverance, Vanguard Belt=-^74^xFFFF74Chaos^7 on Day 1 last league start so let's assume 10c worst case scenario for bad rolls ^7 -Not A RARE item but is more commonly worn on league start so not a 1 divine item but a 10-20c item for good rolls ^xB97123-=BELTIMER BLADE.ETERNAL SWORD=-^7133^xFFFF77Chaos^7^7 on Day 1 last league start so we assume it'll be the same this league so MAKE A PLAN TO MAKE ^x70FF70DOLLARS^7 YALL -ONLY CAN BE FOUNDD IN T10^x70FF70 MAPS^7 OR HIGHER SO THIS WILL TAKE TIME TO FLOOD THE MARKET WHICH IS WHY WE PLAY 2HAND AXES AND MAKE MONEY -Literally the holy grail for our damage to skyrocket and for us to get much more comfortable on our tree and with the ^x70FF70accuracy^7 it gives goated item.
^xB97123 -=Dreamfeather.Etenal Sword=-^74^xFFFF77Chaos^7^7 on day 1 last league start so we can assume around 10c for a good roll -Not rare or expensive only buy this after you have a ^xB97123Beltimer^7 ^xB97123blade^7 that's all I have to say lol but it does have a lot of ^x70FF70accuracy^7 so it helps a ton with the ^x70FF70accuracy^7 issue.

Spec.title: ^6Mid Tier Gear Beltimber Switch Tankier Version
^6Mid Tier Gear Beltimber Switch More Dmg Version

Input.string: 52% less damage (Return Projectiles nerf do not remove) YOU CAN USE ENDURING CRY+URGENT ORDERS AND THE +1 TO MAX ENDURANCE CHARGE IF YOU WANT 4 ENDURANCE CHARGES SINCE WE HAVE 2 SPARE SOCKETS BUT IDK MAN ITS ANOTHER BUTTON YOU DO YOU
Input.name: customMods
